content: Create var_calculator.py for Value at Risk (VaR) calculations with 95% and 99% confidence levels
Create portfolio_metrics.py for aggregated portfolio-level metrics (HHI, risk-adjusted return, etc.)
Create calculation_engine.py orchestrator to coordinate all calculators and run scenario×horizon loops
Create engine_poc.py script to test the calculation engine in isolation with sample data
Run engine_poc.py and verify outputs are consistent, bounded, and performance is acceptable
Review and validate calculation engine outputs against existing risk_engine.py for directional correctness
